prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Honda DOHC F20C (S2000 AP1/AP2)** with a **Toda Racing 87mm stroker crank (2.2L displacement)**, **Toda Racing forged pistons (12.5:1 compression)**, **Toda Racing billet connecting rods**, and **Toda Racing high-lift camshafts (280° duration, 11.5mm lift)**. Paired with a **Hondata K-Pro ECU (S300 v4)** for individual cylinder tuning and **NGK Iridium IX (94000) spark plugs** for optimized combustion.

Forced induction via a **Rotrex C38-91 supercharger** (10.5psi max boost) with a **custom 3.5" intercooler (GReddy Type-S)** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**. Exhaust system features a **J's Racing 4-2-1 equal-length header (S800-specific)** mated to a **Burns Stainless 2.5" stainless steel exhaust** with a **Mugen MF-10 muffler** for aggressive yet legal sound levels.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (S800-specific valving)**, **SuperPro poly bushings (front/rear control arms, subframe)**, and **Cusco 22mm front / 18mm rear adjustable sway bars**. Braking system upgraded to **Endless CC-RG6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear)** with **Brembo P4.32 calipers (4-piston front, 2-piston rear)** and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 (S800-specific) widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (100mm flares)**, **Rocket Bunny duckbill rear spoiler (carbon fiber)**, and **Seibon carbon fiber hood (OEM-style with functional vents)**. Paint scheme: **PPG Honda Championship White (NH-578) with custom metallic blue (PPG HOK 9237) racing stripes** and **Rally Armor UR mud flaps (Honda S800 logo embroidered)**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD-E (S800-specific) bucket seats**, **Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses**, and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**. Dashboard replaced with a **Defi Advance BF gauges (oil pressure, water temp, boost)** and **Sparco Evo V racing pedals**. Roll cage: **Custom 6-point chromoly (Autopower bolt-in)** with **Soundstream REF-5.6200 5-channel amplifier** for audio.

Wheel setup: **Work Meister S1 3P (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear)** with **Yokohama Advan A052 tires (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear)**. Lighting: **Morimoto XB LED headlights (H4 conversion)** and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights (clear lens, red LED)**. Exterior accents: **JDM Honda S800 badges (black/red)** and **C-West front lip (carbon fiber, S800-specific)**.
